description_long: This object is a dual turntable DJ setup featuring two classic record players flanking a central audio mixer. Each turntable has a large, circular black platter with a metallic spindle at the center, and a visible tonearm with a headshell and stylus positioned to the side. The mixer in the center is rectangular, with a dark brown surface, multiple sliders, rotary knobs, and a crossfader for audio control. The turntables have a metallic gray finish with black feet and subtle control buttons on the top left corners. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for professional DJ use in urban environments such as clubs, street events, or music studios. No dust covers are present, leaving all operational components exposed for immediate access.
description: A dual turntable DJ setup with a central mixer, featuring metallic gray platters, exposed tonearms, and multiple control knobs and sliders. The design is robust and professional, ideal for urban music environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both turntables and the central mixer, with tonearms and platters clearly visible.
description_view_1: Direct head-on view highlighting the symmetry of the setup, with both platters, tonearms, and the full mixer interface in the center.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the turntables and mixer, with less detail on the control surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite front view, similar to view 1 but from the other side, showing the mixer and both platters from a slightly different angle.
attribute_turntable_platter: Both turntables have large, circular black platters with a smooth, matte finish and a metallic spindle at the center. The platters occupy most of the surface area of each turntable and are free of visible grooves or patterns, designed for playing standard vinyl records.
attribute_tonearm: Each turntable features a visible tonearm, metallic in appearance with a black headshell, positioned to the right of the platter. The tonearms are medium-length, slightly curved, and rest in their holders, ready to be placed over the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present at the end of each tonearm, appearing as a small, distinct component attached to the headshell. It is metallic with a fine tip, designed for contact with vinyl records.
attribute_control_knobs: Multiple control knobs and sliders are present on the central mixer, including rotary knobs, small round buttons, and two prominent vertical sliders. The knobs are mostly black or silver, located on the top surface of the mixer, with some additional buttons on the turntables themselves.
